p3.title: Unused loop index in CP00-055 weighted-boundary validation
p3.description: The weighted-boundary verification loop destructures `[index, subphaseId]` from `.entries()` but never references `index`; a plain `for (const subphaseId of controlPlaneApiPermissionAuditBoundarySuiteSubphaseIds)` would be equivalent and cleaner.
p3.impact: Cosmetic only. No effect on validation behavior, boundary enforcement, fixture/policy consistency, or closeout state.
p3.recommendation: Optionally iterate the array directly or drop the unused index. Non-blocking.

boundary_checks.upstream_evidence_refs: pass — required_evidence_refs and upstream_evidence_refs bound to CP00-054 closeout-pack files; assembler requires exact match (fail-closed on drift)
boundary_checks.cross_artifact_consistency: pass — policy, service module/assembler, validators, contract definition, fixture, README, and tests are mutually consistent; 59 result fields aligned; fixture result exactly mirrors assembler output (validator's full consistency checks reported clean — only missing CP00-055 evidence files remain, which is expected pre-evidence)
boundary_checks.local_validation: pass — node --check clean; node --test 617 tests pass; preliminary contract validator failure attributable solely to not-yet-created CP00-055 evidence files (expected at this stage)

parsed_review.recommendation: PASS_WITH_FINDINGS. No unresolved P0/P1/P2 findings remain; the single P3 cleanup finding was fixed before closeout.
